name: Doppel
description: The Doppel-Splunk SOAR integration automates the ingestion of Doppel alerts into Splunk SOAR, creating containers and artifacts for efficient analysis. It supports actions to create, retrieve, and update alerts directly within the platform.

historical_polling_days.description: Number of days to look back for initial polling (default: 30)

actions.description: Create a new alert in Doppel for a specific entity.
Fetch details of a specific Doppel alert by its ID or entity.
Retrieve multiple Doppel alerts based on search criteria and filters.
Update an existing Doppel alert's queue state, entity state, comment or tag.

actions.verbose: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

start_time.name: start_time
start_time.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

end_time.name: end_time
end_time.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

container_count.name: container_count
container_count.description: Maximum number of container records to query for.

artifact_count.name: artifact_count
artifact_count.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for.

container_id.name: container_id
container_id.description: Comma-separated list of container IDs to limit the ingestion to.
